items.title: From Voice to Self: An Integrative Framework on Self-Voice Processing
items.author: Pavo Orepic, Ana P. Pinheiro
items.content: <article>Perspectives on Psychological Science, Ahead of Print. The self-voice plays a fundamental role in communication and identity yet remains a relatively neglected topic in psychological science. As AI-generated and digitally manipulated voices become more common, understanding how individuals perceive and ...</article>
